_notes: lens_weights are unnormalized — scoring engine divides by sum of active weights per lens. Add new pillars here + register score_fn in PILLAR_SCORERS in stack JS.

pillars.label: Blast Radius
pillars._placeholder: Grading pipeline not yet built. Flip enabled:true when vendors.blast_radius_grade data lands. Measures: if this vendor is breached/disrupted (e.g. CrowdStrike-style outage), how severe is the downstream impact on your org?

pillars.label: Capability Strength
pillars._placeholder: Grading pipeline not yet built. Flip enabled:true when vendors.capability_grade data lands. Measures: depth of coverage within the vendor's core domain — not just claims, but verified functional breadth.

pillars.label: Regulatory
pillars._placeholder: Future pillar. Measures HIPAA/PCI/SOX/GDPR/FedRAMP coverage per vendor. Requires compliance[] field on vendors.

pillars.label: Geopolitical
pillars._placeholder: Future pillar. Measures vendor HQ jurisdiction, data residency risk, supply chain exposure. Requires jurisdiction/data_residency fields on vendors.
